name: chr2_2q21_SD_module
description: 2q21 SD region encompassing the LCT (lactase) gene and the LRP1B-RAB3GAP1 interval. Contains flanking SDs that contribute to rare 2q21 rearrangements; the LCT regulatory variant is in unique sequence but its haplotype block extends into nearby SDs.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SDs of 20-60 kb at ~94% identity; unique gene complement includes LCT, MCM6, R3HDM1, ZRANB3.
